Department Store Tycoon

Build and manage a thriving multi-story department store! Place different shop types on floors to attract customers. Fulfill customer requests to increase satisfaction and earn revenue. Expand your building vertically, unlock new facilities, and work toward achieving a prestigious 5-star rating. Balance customer needs, manage your budget, and create the ultimate shopping destination.

Controls: Arrow Keys (↑/↓): Navigate floors and menu | Space: Select/Place shop | Shift: Toggle shop menu | Z: Remove shop | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause | R: Restart
